spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: You made it. Good. Keep your voice down.

spoken_lines.speaker: V
spoken_lines.text: Ghostline. Heard the name float around. Never saw the ghosts.

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: That's the point. We're not a gang, not a brand. We listen, collect, move things nobody wants traced.

spoken_lines.speaker: V
spoken_lines.text: Plenty of mercs in Night City. Why pull me in?

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: Because you get in, get out, and don't start asking the wrong questions before the eddies clear.

spoken_lines.speaker: V
spoken_lines.text: Alright. Talk. What am I doing?

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: Tyger Claws are sitting on a relay that looks dead from the street. It isn't. Someone's laundering data through it.

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: You jack the node, pull the cache, and drop it where we tell you. Clean job, if nobody gets curious.

spoken_lines.speaker: V
spoken_lines.text: Tyger Claws don't move like that for free. Who's behind it?

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: Someone Arasaka-adjacent. That's all you need. You want names, ask after the job's done.

spoken_lines.speaker: V
spoken_lines.text: Fine. Send me the coordinates. I'll get your data.

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: Knew you would. Location's already queued.

spoken_lines.speaker: Patch
spoken_lines.text: Pull the cache, use the drop point, and don't improvise unless you have to.
